hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); matched=bool(re.search(r'(combat\.ts|abilities\.ts|technologies\.ts|units\.ts|Sandbox\.tsx|UnitCard\.tsx|useUnitSlot\.ts)$', f)); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'[CLAUDE.md REMINDER] You just edited a key file. Check if CLAUDE.md needs updating (interfaces, function signatures, new state, new mechanics). Update the relevant section before finishing.'}})) if matched else None"
